query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, questionText, questionType, options, correctAnswer, `order`)
SELECT l.id, 
  CONCAT('What is a key concept covered in ', l.title, '?'),
  'multiple_choice',
  '["Understanding the topic","Applying principles","Both A and B","None of the above"]',
  'Both A and B',
  1
FROM lessons l
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id
WHERE c.code IN ('DIV102', 'DIV111', 'DIV112', 'DIV113')
AND l.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT lessonId FROM quiz_questions);
